title: hearth.ember.insight v1
description: Cognitive insight derived from Ember tick — semantic/temporal/causal/entity observations about user behavior and environment. Published by hearth-cognitive after internal insight commit.

event_type.description: CloudEvents type identifier for this event; always 'hearth.ember.insight.v1'.

source.description: URI path identifying the emitting subsystem; always '/hearth/cognitive'.

graph.description: The cognitive graph category this insight belongs to

subject.description: Entity or topic the insight is about

evidence_count.description: Number of observations supporting this insight

created_at.description: RFC3339 UTC timestamp when the insight was created

source_session_id.description: ULID of the session that produced this insight (if applicable)

related_insights.description: ULIDs of related insights for correlation
